name: Aptiv plc
lede: Aptiv runs seven capability centers across five Indian cities. Pune, Chennai, Rewari, Kochi and Bengaluru, covering engineering & design, it and manufacturing, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aptiv office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aptiv plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aptiv runs 7 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Pune, Chennai, Rewari, Kochi, Bengaluru), covering engineering & design, it and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Aptiv's India footprint covers Pune, Chennai, Rewari, Kochi and Bengaluru, spanning engineering & design, it and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Automotive Engineering and Consulting, Automotive Engineering Services

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 23 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Aptiv operate in India?
faq.a: Aptiv operates 7 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aptiv have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Aptiv's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Chennai, Rewari, Kochi and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Aptiv run in India?
faq.a: Aptiv runs engineering & design, it and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aptiv's India GCCs?
faq.a: Aptiv's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aptiv's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 23 leaders at Aptiv's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
